summary: Kang Hyunwoo, known as the 'Romantic Assassin,' wins his match against Reina by using a surprise sword aura technique learned from Lebron. He then challenges Jung Hanbaek, successfully provoking him and ultimately defeating him in a one-sided bout while hiding his true strength. Following his victory, Hyunwoo decides to forfeit his subsequent match to rest, leaving his opponents frustrated by his mysterious tactics and overwhelming skill.
key_moments: Romantic Assassin defeats Reina using a hidden sword aura technique.
Hyunwoo challenges and defeats Jung Hanbaek while intentionally suppressing his power.
Hyunwoo chooses to forfeit his final match to rest, frustrating his opponents.
